name: Oven Jerky#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Put steak in freezer for 30 minutes, until just firm.
2. Slice across the grain into ¼-inch thick strips.
3. Combine remaining ingredients and marinate steak strips in this mixture for at least 2 hours.
4. Place slices on rack in pan, and dry in oven at 150°F for 12 hours, or until when bent, it will crack but not break.
